channel.title: MUTUM
channel.item: Version 2.0.0 Sat, 24 Jun 2026 17:48:00 +0900 Release Notes: Add image generation function. <enclosure url="https://github.com/developerloptic-crypto/MUTUM/releases/download/v.2.0.0/MUTUM2.0.0.zip" sparkle:version="6" sparkle:shortVersionString="2.0.0" length=”4006491" type="application/octet-stream" sparkle:edSignature="/pppUvOoiBZEX/skI8LKdErhw/23nmRR5uZ0z+rMiNJpZKeNzCGkVTK+7/2++j1Ji/gURtY/VOSzENbaGUmlDg==" />
